rules.rule_text:
rule RisePro
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "RisePro system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Build: " ascii
		$x2 = "Version:" ascii
		$x3 = "MachineID:" ascii
		$x4 = "GUID:" ascii
		$x5 = "[Hardware]" ascii
		$x6 = "[Processes]" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
